title: dodecatheon hendersonii var. typicum
intro: Dodecatheon hendersonii var. typicum, also known as Henderson's shooting star, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae) native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Dodecatheon hendersonii var. typicum include reducing inflammation, acting as an antioxidant, and potentially lowering blood pressure, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
